creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 170895
multimedia/qmmp-plugin-pack-qt5: Switch version from 1.0.3 to 1.0.4

qmmp-plugin-pack-1.0.4 has been released.  This minor upgraded version
contains bugfix of minimal version check on TagLib using cmake.  Short
hack on our Makefile to fix this bag is no longer needed and removed.

Beside of this update, in Makefile:
* Declare more dependency information that the Q/A test claims, and
* Set PORTSCOUT to specify targeted version is 1.*, not 0.*.
